text:
Soufrabi (ソウフラビ, Soufurabi), "The Port City", is a city located on Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 155 

Overview

Soufrabi is a city with a beautiful line of cliffs that are ruled by pirates. The lighthouse on a headland of the city is their secret den. To be allowed to fight against the pirates, a player is required to form a team of exactly 15 people and come here together with his teammates. If they can purge the pirates from the town, they will be rewarded with a very rare and important item. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Gon, Killua, and Biscuit come to Soufrabi for the first time in a group of 15, including the members of Kazsule's, Hanse's, Asta's, and Yabibi's teams. Because most of the group's members lack fighting skills, Killua, Biscuit, and Gon intentionally lose their matches against Razor's pirates. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 157 The three later return, having recruited stronger players like Hisoka Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 159 and the members of Tsezguerra's team. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 160 The new group defeats Razor and his pirates who leave Soufrabi as compensation. An NPC woman then thanks the group and rewards them with the "Plot of Beach" card. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 17, Chapter 169
